case_title: CALIFORNIA SERVICE BUREAU INC. VS. ENILDA LIMON et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA SERVICE BUREAU INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LIMON, ENILDA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
